context: Tests whether the agent correctly structures a three-tier design token system in JSON, uses Style Dictionary with appropriate configuration (prefix, output paths, file formats), and names semantic tokens based on meaning rather than visual appearance.

checklist.name: Global token file
checklist.description: A global token JSON file exists (e.g., tokens/global.json) containing raw values for color, font-size, spacing, radius, or shadow categories

checklist.name: Semantic token file
checklist.description: A semantic token JSON file exists (e.g., tokens/semantic.json) containing meaning-bearing aliases that reference global tokens

checklist.name: Value object structure
checklist.description: Token entries in all JSON files use the `{ "value": "..." }` object format (not bare strings or other shapes)

checklist.name: Cross-reference syntax
checklist.description: Semantic token JSON uses curly-brace reference syntax (e.g., `{color.blue-600}`) to point to global tokens, not hard-coded hex values

checklist.name: Style Dictionary package
checklist.description: The build script imports and uses the `style-dictionary` (or `StyleDictionary`) package, not a hand-rolled JSON-to-CSS converter

checklist.name: Store prefix configured
checklist.description: Style Dictionary configuration includes `prefix: 'store'` so generated variables are prefixed `--store-`

checklist.name: CSS output path and file
checklist.description: Style Dictionary CSS platform targets `src/styles/generated/` as buildPath and produces `tokens.css`

checklist.name: CSS root selector
checklist.description: Style Dictionary CSS file config uses `format: 'css/variables'` with `options: { selector: ':root' }`

checklist.name: JS token output
checklist.description: Style Dictionary JS platform produces a `tokens.js` file using `format: 'javascript/es6'`

checklist.name: Meaning-based semantic names
checklist.description: Semantic token names describe purpose or role (e.g., `brand-primary`, `surface`, `on-surface`, `price-sale`) rather than the color value they currently hold (e.g., `blue-600`, `gray-50`)

checklist.name: No raw values in semantics
checklist.description: Semantic token JSON entries do NOT contain raw hex, rgb, or hard-coded rem values — they reference global tokens via the curly-brace syntax
